title: SIGSEGV in MANIFOLDjob
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, name FROM bar UNION ALL SELECT id, NULL FROM bar;
SELECT (created_at - TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00'), name FROM bar UNION ALL SELECT (created_at - TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00'), NULL FROM bar;
key_bug_features: selecting null values in union query
